text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, we're already back at the<n>academy! Today
went by in a flash!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? Isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that... Air Groove? It looks like<n>she's
heading our way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What if she's found out that it was<n>me who
placed the whoopee<n>cushions in the student
council<n>office?!
choice_data_list: What did you do that for?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't get the wrong idea! It was a<n>spell! If
successful, it's supposed to<n>give you courage!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Still, I can't have her finding out the<n>truth! If she
does, the spell becomes<n>a curse!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Nay! Divine Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I entrust this life of mine into your<n>care! Please do
well by me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having said that, Matikanefukukitaru<n>quickly darts
away, hiding out of<n>sight.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Where did Fukukitaru get off to? I<n>swear I just
saw her over here...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Is that so... Then, could you pass on<n>this message
for me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'd prefer to tell her in person, but I<n>have an
emergency meeting to get to.<n>I'm afraid I can't
spare the time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Please tell her I said... thank you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This morning at the dorm, she forced<n>this hole
punch into my hands with all<n>this talk that it was
my lucky item.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I wasn't sure I<n>believed in
fortune-telling, but thanks<n>to her, I was able to
prepare for my<n>upcoming meeting effectively.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That being said, her usual reckless<n>behavior is not
acceptable. She<n>shouldn't get carried away.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Tell her that for me too.
choice_data_list: ...And that's what Air Groove had to say.
...And that's what Air Groove had to say.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urk... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wahhh! I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Having someone validate my<n>divinations... It's like
I'm being<n>validated too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I know why this happened...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's because I put myself at risk<n>placing all those
whoopee cushions!<n>I'm sure of it!
choice_data_list: Try not to overdo it, okay?
Try not to overdo it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sure! I don't really understand what<n>you mean,
but I'll try not to!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...Well, she's on her way to retrieve<n>the whoopee
cushions at least.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Over there?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gah! You traitooor!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's with the attitude? I'm<n>only here to
thank you for this<n>morning.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Thank me? Oh, are you talking<n>about the
lucky item?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right. Thanks to that hole<n>punch you
gave me—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's what it was! I thought<n>you found out
that it was me who<n>planted all the whoopee
cushions last<n>week!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh? So that was your doing?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oops...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Why don't the two of us go to the<n>student council
office now so<n>everyone can... thank you... for you
contributions?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Arghh! Someone save meee!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I accompany Matikanefukukitaru to<n>accept
everyone's "thanks."
